creator: root@Chat.NetDesign1.Com
text:
When installing fvwm95 on a machine that has no sound card, rplay
and gsm aren't really needed. Do they need to be in it's base install? 
Since the installation doesn't include them either..

Fix: 

An option for the make line, like NOSND=YES, or -DNOSND would
be usefull.
